title: We The Nerds
description:
◘ In this modpack, players can expect a pretty 'True-to-Vanilla' experience. New stuff will be added as mods release and pique my interest. I will disclose any new mods/updates in new releases.

◘No prerequisites are needed and the game plays like Vanilla.
body:
The pack of mods 'We the Nerds' use in our world!

 If you want any mod that fits more or less, feel free to PLEASE comment them :)

 

If you had to ask me if this was a light modpack, I would say kinda :D

 

It's in between a medium modpack and a light one. With a bunch of mods thrown together, that work, and provide a pretty decent experience!

 

QoL stuff, mixed with immersion!

 

Videos are fine BTW!
